overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a third-person perspective of a futuristic convertible driving through Night City at night. The vehicle navigates wet neon-lit streets, passes through an underpass onto elevated highways, and enters dense commercial districts with massive holographic billboards and illuminated cherry blossom trees.

events.description: turning right at intersection to enter underpass beneath elevated highway

agents.ego_description: driving futuristic convertible through city streets and approaching a traffic intersection

large illuminated advertisement sign on building facade
elevated highway structure spanning across the road ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet neon-lit city street at night, approaching a traffic intersection with yellow crosswalk markings. The vehicle drives past orange safety barriers and glass commercial buildings with digital advertisements, then turns right toward an overpass entrance.

events.description: entering dark tunnel underpass with artificial overhead lighting
exiting tunnel onto open elevated highway with city views

agents.ego_description: passing through short concrete underpass tunnel with reduced lighting

entered.detail: concrete tunnel structure with overhead artificial lighting

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a dark concrete underpass beneath the elevated highway, illuminated by artificial tunnel lights. After a brief covered section, the car emerges onto an open elevated highway with concrete barriers and distant city skyline visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway with city skyline views

agents.ego_description: cruising on elevated highway with moderate speed, following the curved road

entered.detail: multi-lane raised road with concrete safety barriers on sides
tall buildings with illuminated windows and neon signage

segments.scene_description: Driving along the curved elevated highway with concrete barriers, the scene opens up to reveal distant neon-lit skyscrapers against the night sky. The wet road surface reflects the city lights as the vehicle maintains steady speed on the multi-lane thoroughfare.

scene_state.functional_zone: massive neon-lit intersection with overhead commercial structures

events.description: passing under massive green-lit overpass structure into dense commercial district

agents.ego_description: navigating through increasingly dense urban environment with heavy neon signage and moderate traffic

entered.detail: large overhead highway structure with prominent green neon lighting underneath
tall building facade with prominent Kiroshi corporate signage
large digital advertisement display for Below Deck
trees with pink illuminated blossoms lining the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes under a massive green-lit overpass structure, entering a dense commercial district filled with towering holographic billboards including Kiroshi and Below Deck advertisements. Illuminated cherry blossom trees become visible in the distance as the environment transitions to a more enclosed urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial neon street with illuminated cherry blossoms

agents.ego_description: maneuvering through heavy traffic in the neon-lit cherry blossom district with frequent lane changes

notable_agents.action: black sedan overtaking on the left side
white compact car merging from the right lane

entered.detail: digital signage displaying NCPD police department logo and text
tightly packed high-rise structures covered in multiple holographic advertisements

segments.scene_description: Driving through the densest section of the commercial district, the street is lined with illuminated cherry blossom trees on the left and massive digital billboards including NCPD signage. Heavy futuristic traffic fills the multi-lane road as the vehicle navigates between other cars under the glow of countless neon advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a neon-lit metropolis that transitions from wet street-level intersections to an expansive elevated highway and finally into a dense commercial canyon. It begins on a rain-slicked city street, passing orange safety barriers and digital advertisements before turning right toward an overpass. The camera then follows the vehicle as it plunges into a dark, artificially lit concrete underpass, emerging shortly after onto an open elevated highway where the distant skyline becomes visible against the night sky. As the vehicle maintains its speed along the curved thoroughfare, the scene shifts beneath a massive green-lit overpass and into a district dominated by towering holographic billboards for Kiroshi and Below Deck. Finally, the environment closes in as the car navigates heavy futuristic traffic through an urban canyon lined with glowing NCPD signage and illuminated cherry blossom trees.
